blockingIssues: scripts/check.sh:11-13 uses a text regex that misses valid Cargo RNG dependency declarations such as [dependencies.rand], single-quoted package aliases, and workspace-inherited aliases, so acceptance criterion 5 is not fully enforced despite the script claiming aliases cannot bypass it.
summary: Philox correctness, coordinate packing, Random123 vectors, purity/collision coverage, million-sample uniform and exponential tests, endpoint handling, and rustdoc all pass. Revision is required only to make the external-RNG dependency guard manifest-aware or otherwise complete for valid Cargo syntax.
